pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target levels remain at 17.
API incompatibilities and missing classes in Keycloak 23.0.1 will cause compilation or runtime errors if the old version is used.
Quarkus 3.x requires Java 17+ and has significant API changes; using Quarkus 2.x with Keycloak 23.0.1 causes dependency conflicts and runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated quarkus.resteasy.version property as Resteasy is no longer managed via this specific Quarkus property in Quarkus 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The property is unused or invalid in the new Quarkus 3 dependency management structure, potentially causing build warnings or errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit version management for Jandex to resolve dependency conflicts introduced by Keycloak/Quarkus upgrade.
pom.xml.why_exists: Transitive dependencies may pull in incompatible Jandex versions, causing runtime linkage errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit version management for ASM to resolve dependency conflicts introduced by Keycloak/Quarkus upgrade.
pom.xml.why_exists: Transitive dependencies may pull in incompatible ASM versions, causing runtime linkage errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit version management for Resteasy to align with Quarkus 3 and Keycloak 23 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Incompatible Resteasy versions will cause compilation errors or runtime classloading failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude transitive Resteasy, Jandex, ASM, and Vertx dependencies from keycloak-quarkus-server to prevent version conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Conflicting transitive dependencies cause runtime linkage errors or classpath pollution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude transitive Resteasy dependencies from keycloak-admin-client to prevent version conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Conflicting transitive dependencies cause runtime linkage errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude transitive Resteasy multipart provider from keycloak-services to prevent version conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Conflicting transitive dependencies cause runtime linkage errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Quarkus-specific Resteasy dependencies with explicit Resteasy core/client/jackson/multipart dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3 changes how Resteasy is managed; old artifacts may be missing or incompatible.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Quarkus-specific REST client dependencies with explicit Vertx and Resteasy dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3 changes how REST clients are managed; old artifacts may be missing or incompatible.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit Vertx core dependency to resolve conflicts after excluding it from Quarkus Vertx artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Missing Vertx core classes will cause runtime NoClassDefFoundError.
